summary: AI Engineer with 3+ years of industry experience delivering production-grade ML systems in enterprise environments. Strong background in ML, NLP, LLM-based applications, and MLOps, with hands-on experience shipping end-to-end systems from modelling and evaluation to deployment and post-release stability.

highlights: Developed backend services supporting automated telecom customer onboarding and service provisioning workflows across enterprise CRM systems.
Designed and implemented scalable REST APIs and orchestration services handling 100k+ customer transactions for product configuration and order lifecycle management.
Built data validation and transformation pipelines ensuring consistency across millions of telecom customer records and downstream provisioning systems.
Implemented event-driven asynchronous processing pipelines and integrated predictive AI model inference within CRM workflows, reducing manual onboarding effort by ~30%.
Integrated backend services with AWS (S3, Lambda) and supported production releases, defect resolution, and system reliability improvements.

education.degree: Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence
Bachelor of Technology in Electrical and Electronics Engineering
